title: デビュー戦の後に・大型新人

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's great performance at her
debut puts her on everyone's radar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to push herself to even greater heights
in her pursuit of the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A runner named Rice Shower watches Mihono
Bourbon very intently as she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her ability to bring smiles to the faces of the
spectators makes her the object of Rice Shower's
admiration.
